title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Cocoyasi Village and nearby towns show the cost of Arlong’s occupation.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shahahaha! An excellent revenge, indeed!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's an Arlong Pirate's crew officer for ya!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A combination of performance in

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: This is bad...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: B-B- Brother USOP... WAS...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: killed by... Sister Nami! How can this be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wasn't it your dream to die in the sea...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My apologies for doubting you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You truly are one of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: One of you? Don't lump me together with the likes of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's only one reason why I joined this crew!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And that's to raise 100 million belli,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: and buy cocoyashi village from you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Consider me as more of an ally.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: You've betrayed both your fellow villagers and your mother...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And so I've always wondered why you, who believes in nothing else but money,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: would want to buy a crummy little village.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That is, until I found this in your room.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's my...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmm? What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Your what? Don't you seem quite flustered.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This is a worn-out treasure map!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: A map of this island that, without a doubt, points specifically at Cocoyashi Village!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: H-hidden treasure!? A treasure prove!? That's amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let me see, let me see!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Give it back.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's Nami's map.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't you dare touch it!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This is mine!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I've had enough of your stupid suspicions. I really don't care whether you trust me or not but I do care about our promise.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You wouldn't just call it off after all these years, would you?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Of course not. I would rather die than break a promise involving money.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's the kind of man I am...!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
